Title: Uchû ichi no kyô senshi Saiya-jin mezameru!
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Hiromi Tsuru, Tôru Furuya
Plot: While on their way to Earth, Vegeta and Nappa take a quick detour in an attempt to conquer the planet Arlia. Meanwhile, Gohan dines on the tail of a dinosaur, Lunch runs from the police, and Gokû continues down Hebi no Michi.
